name: Oversized Wool Coat
description: Floor-skimming silhouette in dense Italian wool. Dropped shoulders, hidden placket, raw-edge hem.

name: Leather Biker Jacket
description: Matte black lambskin with asymmetric zip. Cut boxy, worn heavy.

name: Boxy Hoodie — Shadow
description: 480 gsm brushed fleece. Cropped body, oversized hood, tonal embroidery.

name: Zip Hoodie — Eclipse
description: Full-zip heavyweight hoodie with storm collar and matte hardware.

name: Heavy Tee — Blank
description: 250 gsm ring-spun cotton. No print, no logo. The blank canvas.

name: Longsleeve — Static
description: Slim longsleeve in washed black jersey with thumbhole cuffs.

name: Oversized Tee — Noir
description: Drop-shoulder tee in double-faced cotton. Falls like a frame from a film.

name: Wide Cargo Pants
description: Parachute-wide leg, six pockets, adjustable hem toggles. Ripstop cotton.

name: Tailored Wool Trousers
description: High-rise pleated trousers in charcoal wool. Sharp crease, fluid drape.

name: Beanie — Mono
description: Ribbed merino beanie with tonal woven label.

name: Canvas Tote — 01
description: Heavy blackout canvas tote with interior zip pocket. Fits a life.

name: Wool Scarf — Fog
description: Two meters of graphite boiled wool. Wrap twice, disappear.
